mapper.select: SELECT link_id, resource_id, link_type, platform, url, title, description, cover_url, sort_order, status, ctime, mtime, deleted FROM resource_link WHERE resource_id = #{resourceId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, ctime DESC

SELECT link_id, resource_id, link_type, platform, url, title, description, cover_url, sort_order, click_count, status, ctime, mtime, deleted FROM resource_link WHERE link_id = #{linkId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resource_link ( link_id, resource_id, link_type, platform, url, title, description, cover_url, sort_order, click_count, status, ctime, mtime, deleted ) VALUES ( #{linkId}, #{resourceId}, #{linkType}, #{platform}, #{url}, #{title}, #{description}, #{coverUrl}, #{sortOrder}, 0, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE resource_link
link_type = #{linkType}, platform = #{platform}, url = #{url}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, mtime = NOW()
WHERE link_id = #{linkId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE resource_link SET deleted = 1, mtime = NOW() WHERE link_id = #{linkId} AND deleted = 0
